violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not located properly or not used in the required manner. -Thermometer in back corner of kitchen refrigerator.--Temperature measuring device was not provided. -No thermometer in coffee station refrigerator or freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Drawer front has fallen off at back prep area.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Pans in dish drainer on clean side of 3 comp sink have food residue present. -Pans with food residue at clean storage in cabinet below prep counter.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Food residue/crumb debris at interior shelves and surfaces of refrigeration units: kitchen refrigerator, kitchen freezer, coffee station freezer and refrigerator compartments. -Some debris/residue at bottom interior of oven. -Chemical residue at bleach bottle surface. -Cabinet under prep sink do for wipe down/organization. -Butter splattered at interior surfaces of microwave.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Residue at wall behind kitchen trash can. -Dirty buckets in utility room.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
